texto: ...I have followed one line only of anthropological enquiry, the survival of an indigenous European cult and the interaction between it and the exotic religion which finally overwhelmed it. I have traced the worship of the Horned God onwards through the centuries from the Palaeolithic prototypes,...
explicacao: Citação de Margatet Alice Murray sobre temas ligados a fe. “...I have followed one line only of anthropological enquiry, the survival of an indigenous Europe…” articula fe, god, wicca em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como wicca e witchcraft.
